HOME1_CONTENT01: The second phase of the Jockey Club 'Bright Start' Project (2025-2029) aims to promote high-quality infant and toddler care and education concepts to families with children aged 0-3 and the wider community across Hong Kong, creating a high-quality environment that fosters the healthy growth and development of infants and toddlers.
HOME1_CONTENT02: This project is funded by The Hong Kong Jockey Club Charities Trust, organized by the Yew Chung College of Early Childhood Education, and has invited the Pacific Early Childhood Education Research Association (Hong Kong) and The Chinese University of Hong Kong as professional partners.
HOME2_CONTENT01: The second phase of the Jockey Club 'Bright Start' Project is a 4-year initiative (2025-2029), continued to be supported by The Hong Kong Jockey Club Charities Trust with a donation of approximately HK$200 million. The project will cover about 80% of the child care centers providing services for newborns to 3-year-olds in Hong Kong, benefiting 15 participating child care centers, other kindergarten-cum-child care centers, major social service units, relevant parents, and community members.
HOME2_CONTENT02: Organized by the Yew Chung College of Early Childhood Education, the project has invited the Pacific Early Childhood Education Research Association (Hong Kong) and The Chinese University of Hong Kong as professional partners. Through inter-professional collaboration, it provides professional guidance on care and education practices for participating child care centers and further promotes support for parent education and community involvement to create a favorable environment for infant development.
HOME2_CONTENT03: This phase of the project will cover a series of professional support programs, including: inter-professional support and collaboration, establishment of professional learning communities, overseas professional exchanges, parent and community practice, infrastructure enhancement, and digital platforms to promote the continuous optimization of infant care and education.
HOME2_CONTENT04: 'Bright Start' represents the beginning of life. Ensuring infants can enjoy the highest quality care and education services to enrich their future is the heart of the Jockey Club 'Bright Start' Project. We look forward to working hand-in-hand with inter-professional practitioners, parents, and community partners to jointly open a new chapter for the future of early childhood education in Hong Kong, responding to the community's demand for quality early childhood education services.
HOME3_CONTENT01: The Jockey Club 'Bright Start' Project will cover about 80% of child care centers providing services for newborns to 3-year-olds in Hong Kong, benefiting 15 participating child care centers, other kindergarten-cum-child care centers, major social service units, relevant parents, and community members. This phase of the project will cover a series of professional support programs, including: inter-professional support and collaboration, establishment of professional learning communities, overseas professional exchanges, parent and community practice, infrastructure enhancement, and digital platforms to promote the continuous optimization of infant care and education.
HOME4_CONTENT01: Enhance the professional competence of preschool teachers
HOME4_CONTENT03: Improve the quality of infant and toddler services
HOME4_EXPLAIN: This project benefits 15 participating child care centers, other kindergarten-cum-child care centers, major social service units, relevant parents, and community members.

从知识基础到专业同行，透过系统化的专业发展路径，<br>持续提升幼儿教顾实践的品: From foundational knowledge to professional mentorship, continuously enhance the quality and professionalism of infant care and education practices through a systematic development path.
专业介入后提供为期一年的持续支援，确保实践成果的巩固与延续。: Provide one year of continuous support after professional intervention to ensure the consolidation and continuation of practical results.
教学与照顾实践的专业深化: Professional Deepening of Teaching and Care Practices
基础设施提升的规划与执行: Planning and Execution of Infrastructure Enhancement
幼儿中心管理与组织的专业提升: Professional Enhancement of Child Care Center Management and Organization
“喜步”同行耀社区: Bright Start Shines in the Community
提升香港幼儿中心的专业形象与地位: Enhance the professional image and status of child care centers in Hong Kong
三个递进式阶段，从基础知识到综合应用，再到专业同行启导，全面支持幼儿老师的专业成: Three progressive stages, from basic knowledge to comprehensive application and professional mentorship, fully supporting the professional growth of preschool teachers.
<strong>新入职幼儿老师</strong><br>加深对教顾实践的理解:
Newly Joined Teachers
Deepen understanding of care and education practices
全面理解在教顾实践上各个方面的<strong>相互关联</strong>: Fully understand the interconnections of various aspects of care and education practice
<strong>到校启导</strong>：对当前的实践进行深入讨论、评估和反思: On-site Mentorship: In-depth discussion, assessment, and reflection on current practices
追求<strong>高品质</strong>的教顾环境: Pursue a high-quality care and education environment
如欲查询更多详情，可电邮至 <a href='mailto:brightstar: For more details, please email brightstart.jc@yccece.edu.hk or fill out the form below.
透过学校互访、专业交流会及海外考察，建构开放的学习型社群，促进知识分享与持续成长: Through school visits, professional exchanges, and overseas study tours, build an open learning community to promote knowledge sharing and continuous growth.
教顾实践分享: Sharing of Care and Education Practices
回顾及总结专业发展的学习历程: Review and summarize the learning journey of professional development
